Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1438

Title: Establishes scholarship programs within the New York 529 program
Summary: Authorizes the comptroller, in consultation with the NYS higher education services corporation, to develop and administer a scholarship and savings program to provide a pathway for eligible children to save for education expenses.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to establishing scholarship programs within the New York 529 program
